title: Llamallo - Decorate Your Llamas
description: A small data pack aimed at making a bunch of carpet-like blocks equippable on llamas.
body:
Makes some carpet-like blocks equippable on llamas, like regular carpets.

current equippable blocks:
Moss Carpet,
Pale Moss Carpet,
Snow Layer, and acacia mangrove oak and spruce trapdoors

I am planning to add more in the future so if you have any ideas let me know!

inspired by u/Hexapet

make sure to download both the datapack the resource pack

please note that you may need to place and break existing carpets because of how loot tables work =/
